prompt: Create a realistic warm indoor lifestyle photo of an adult woman reclining sideways on a cream-colored bed in a cozy bedroom, playing gently with one orange tabby kitten. The subject has shoulder-length light brown hair, wears a simple white sleeveless tank top and dark navy shorts, and is posed on her side with one arm supporting her body and one hand holding a thin string toy near the kitten. The kitten lies beside her on the bedding, alert and facing the camera, with visible orange stripes and soft fur. The face of the human subject is intentionally covered by a solid medium-brown rectangular privacy block. Use a vertical portrait composition, waist-up to thigh framing, soft shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, realistic fabric folds, and a calm intimate atmosphere. In the background include exactly one glowing bedside table lamp casting warm yellow light against a beige wall, with pillows and rumpled cream bedding visible. Lighting should be soft, cinematic, cozy, and slightly dim, like an evening bedroom scene. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no additional animals.
